top_3_trending_hook_styles: What if scenarios with a surprising twist, e.g. 'What Happens If An Astronaut Gets Stuck Floating In Space?'
Revealing little-known facts, e.g. 'Top secret Amazing kitchen Hacks'
Posing thought-provoking questions, e.g. 'What if you fired a gun on different planets?'
market_pulse.best_performing_content_type: short, engaging videos that reveal surprising facts or secrets, often using a 'what if' scenario or a thought-provoking question
market_pulse.viral_trigger: using a combination of attention-grabbing titles, thumbnails, and hooks that create curiosity and encourage viewers to watch the video to learn more

competitor_intelligence.their_secret: creating high-quality, engaging content that is both informative and entertaining, often using animation, slow-motion footage, or other visually appealing elements
title_patterns: creating curiosity with questions or 'what if' scenarios
hook_patterns: starting with a surprising fact or statistic
using a personal story or anecdote
topics_they_avoid: very technical or complex topics that may be difficult for a general audience to understand
topics that are too similar to their previous content
